other_observers: Tanya Miller from Trail Wise Guides.; I am.
specific_location: A feeder located on a private home
description: A lone individual was observed in a feeder near Tennessee Pass. It share the space with dozens of pine grosbeaks and gray-crowned rosy-finches. I am attaching a photo for plumage details.Behaviors: The bird seemed calmes and tranquil among the other birds. It was the second observation in two days and it was not present at the feeder 3 days later when I went back.Call: N/APlumage: N/A
